chart_board_stance: Risk is supported, but adds need chart confirmation and ticker-specific valuation discipline.

relationships.relationship: Index trend should be confirmed by falling or contained volatility.
relationships.read: Risk trend confirmed by contained fear.

relationships.relationship: Rising rates pressure long-duration growth multiples.
relationships.read: High-duration AI/growth needs stricter valuation and entry discipline.

relationships.relationship: TLT should move opposite yield pressure; bond bid can signal rate relief or defensiveness.
relationships.read: Bond weakness keeps discount-rate pressure alive.

relationships.relationship: Strong dollar often tightens global liquidity and weighs on risk assets.
relationships.read: Dollar pressure reduces risk permission, especially crypto/global cyclicals.

relationships.relationship: BTC above long trend can confirm speculative liquidity.
Oil strength can revive inflation and rates pressure.
relationships.read: Oil is not adding major inflation pressure.

landscape_headline.summary: Index Ballast / Liquidity Beta is currently mixed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.
Payments / Financial Infrastructure is currently mixed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.
AI Compute Expansion is currently stressed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.
Bitcoin Financialization is currently stressed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.

panels.label: S&P 500
panels.why_it_matters: Index is above long-term trend but not extremely extended.
panels.forward_implication: Selective risk is allowed if VIX/rates do not contradict.
annotations: Index is above long-term trend but not extremely extended.
Selective risk is allowed if VIX/rates do not contradict.
panels.invalidates: Failed reclaim or close below 200D weakens risk permission.

panels.label: Nasdaq 100
panels.why_it_matters: Price is far above the 200D average, so upside may continue but entry risk is elevated.
panels.forward_implication: Hold winners; avoid chasing broad index exposure until pullback/retest.
annotations: Price is far above the 200D average, so upside may continue but entry risk is elevated.
Hold winners; avoid chasing broad index exposure until pullback/retest.
panels.invalidates: A controlled pullback that holds 20D/50D keeps trend intact; loss of 200D shifts to risk review.

panels.label: QQQ
panels.forward_implication: No portfolio change from this chart alone.
annotations: No portfolio change from this chart alone.
panels.invalidates: Opposite confirmation across trend, volatility, and liquidity charts.

panels.label: VIX
panels.why_it_matters: Low VIX means fear is low; this can support trends but also reduces margin of safety.
panels.forward_implication: Do not chase; look for pullbacks, hedge review, or rotation confirmation.
annotations: Low VIX means fear is low; this can support trends but also reduces margin of safety.
Do not chase; look for pullbacks, hedge review, or rotation confirmation.
panels.invalidates: VIX rising above 20 while indexes fall confirms risk-off pressure.

panels.label: 10Y yield
panels.why_it_matters: Rising yields compress long-duration valuation multiples.
panels.forward_implication: Be stricter on AI/growth valuation; favor cash-flow durability.
annotations: Rising yields compress long-duration valuation multiples.
Be stricter on AI/growth valuation; favor cash-flow durability.
panels.invalidates: Yield trend rolls over and TLT confirms bid.

panels.label: Bitcoin
panels.why_it_matters: BTC below long-term trend weakens high-beta liquidity signal.
annotations: BTC below long-term trend weakens high-beta liquidity signal.

panels.label: Oil WTI
panels.why_it_matters: Oil modifies inflation, rates, and sector rotation pressure.
panels.forward_implication: Rising oil favors energy/inflation hedges but can pressure margins and rates.
annotations: Oil modifies inflation, rates, and sector rotation pressure.
Rising oil favors energy/inflation hedges but can pressure margins and rates.
panels.invalidates: Oil trend reversal through moving-average band.

panels.label: Dollar index
panels.why_it_matters: Strong dollar often tightens global liquidity and pressures risk assets.
panels.forward_implication: Be cautious on crypto, commodities, and high-beta risk.
annotations: Strong dollar often tightens global liquidity and pressures risk assets.
Be cautious on crypto, commodities, and high-beta risk.
panels.invalidates: Dollar rolls over below moving averages.

panels.label: Long bonds
panels.why_it_matters: Weak bonds keep duration pressure alive.
annotations: Weak bonds keep duration pressure alive.

rules: Charts are evidence surfaces for regime permission, strategy posture, invalidation, and capital allocation.
Every chart declares role, current read, forward implication, and invalidation.
Market regime is produced from cross-chart confirmation: index trend, volatility, rates, dollar, bonds, and speculative liquidity.
